name: Fruit Fritters with Lemon-Bourbon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, beaten egg, water, and melted butter until well combined.
2. Add the vanilla extract to the batter and stir until incorporated.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan or pot over medium heat.
4. Scoop small portions of the batter into the hot oil and flatten slightly with a spatula.
5. Fry each fritter for 2-3 minutes on each side, turning off the heat when golden brown and crispy.
6. Remove the cooked fritters from the oil using a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
7. Repeat with remaining batter until all ingredients are used up.
8. Serve the fruit fritters warm alongside the lemon-bourbon sauce made by combining equal parts sugar, water, and bourbon in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir until dissolved and simmer for 5 minutes before serving.
